nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

nodes.name: Common nighthawk
nodes.summary: Common nighthawk（Common nighthawk，学名 Chordeiles minor），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括湿地，主要威胁包括农药污染、气候变化。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |last2=Wilson |first2=Scott |last3=Mitchell |first3=Greg |date=2017 |title=Assessing the relative use of clearcuts, burned stands, and wetlands as breeding habitat for two declining aerial insectivores in the boreal forest |journal=Forest Ecology and Management |volume=386 |pages=62–70 |doi=10.1016/j.foreco.2016.11.026|bibcode=2017ForEM.386...62F }} The common nighthawk is drawn into urban built-up areas by insects. The common nighthawk is the only nighthawk occurring over the majority of northern North America

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Lack of flat roofs, pesticides, increased predation and loss of habitat are noted factors of their decline

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Further unstudied potential causes of decline include climate change, disease, road kills, man-made towers (posing aerial hazards), and parasites. The absence of flat roofs (made with gravel) in urban settings is an important cause of decline

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Common nighthawk 属于目 夜鷹目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Common nighthawk 属于科 夜鹰科。

links.label: 属于目
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 中的 order / order_cn 与 family / family_cn 字段补充。

links.label: 属于科
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 中的 family / family_cn 字段补充。
